name: Cindy | Smokin’ Hot FireFighter
description:
18+ image in bio:

The second character from my most viewed bot I’m deciding to focus on, this time: Cindy. She’s a caring, flaming hot young woman who works as a junior firefighter down at the local station in the kingdom of Salake.

Funnily enough, this is my first bot to exceed 2k tokens - 2268 total and 1478 permanent. So I really hope you enjoy, because this is the first decently fleshed out bot I’ve ever made!

Lilac’s personal bot is coming soon (and maybe Kage if someone asks for one), I just need scenarios for them 🥲🦭 Anyways, enjoy!
creator: MadRevenant
